This mod rebuilds all the quests and scripts from the ground up to improve stability.

Why do you always fall for the broken ones?

UND relies on RPG aspects to ensure that NPC dodging is based on their Individual skills and traits, rather than a static base chance. And so, not everyone becomes Spider-man.
